message:
fix(channel): add proper waiter deregistration to broadcast and mpsc channels

Prevents unbounded waiter queue growth by tracking registered waiters with
an atomic flag, similar to the mutex fix in the previous commit.

broadcast.rs:
- Add RecvWaiter struct with waker + queued flag (Arc<AtomicBool>)
- Track waiter registration state in Recv future
- Set queued=false when waking waiters to prevent re-registration
- Re-register with new waiter flag if previous was consumed

mpsc.rs:
- Apply same pattern to MPSC channel receivers
- Track per-waiter queued state
- Prevent duplicate waiter entries on spurious wakes

This follows the intrusive linked list pattern used in production async
runtimes, providing proper deregistration semantics without the overhead
of actual intrusive data structures.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
